qa.t: abbr. 品质保证（Quality Assurance）；质量评价（Quality Assessment）

qaa.t: [医]喹胺酸，螯核羧酚[抗辐射药]

qac.t: abbr. quaternary ammonium compound 季铵化合物（杀菌剂）

qacs.t: (qac 的复数) abbr. quaternary ammonium compound 季铵化合物（杀菌剂）

qaddafi.t:
n. (Qaddafi)人名；(阿拉伯)卡扎菲
卡扎菲
qaddafi.d: n. Libyan leader who seized power in a military coup d'etat in 1969; deposed the Libyan monarchy and imposed socialism and Islamic orthodoxy on the country (born in 1942)

qadhafi.t: 卡扎菲（利比亚政治领袖）

qadi.t: abbr. Quality Assurance Department Instruction 质量保证部的指示

qaeda.t: [网络] 凯达；组织盖达；品牌

qaid.t: n. 酋长, 伊斯兰教法官或市政官员

qaing.t: (qa 的现在分词) abbr. 品质保证（Quality Assurance）；质量评价（Quality Assessment）

qais.t: abbr. quality audit information system 质量检查信息系统

qaisar.t: [地名] [阿富汗] 盖萨尔; [地名] [阿富汗] 盖萨尔河

qaly.t: abbr. quality-adjusted life-year 质量调整寿命年龄

qan.t: abbr. Qantas Airways 澳洲航空公司

qanat.t: n. (伊朗等国从山上引水至平原的)暗渠,坎儿井

qandahar.t: n. 坎大哈（等于Kandahar, 阿富汗城市名）
qandahar.d: n. a city in southern Afghanistan; an important trading center

qantas.t: n. 澳洲航空（澳大利亚最大型及历史最悠久的航空公司）

qara shahr.t: 焉耆(中国新疆中部一城市, 亦作Yenki)

qas.t: abbr. quick-acting scuttle 快速撤桶，速闭舱口盖

qasim.t: n. 卡西姆（巴基斯坦港口）

qat.d: n. the leaves of the shrub Catha edulis which are chewed like tobacco or used to make tea; has the effect of a euphoric stimulant

qatar.d:
n. an Arab country on the peninsula of Qatar; achieved independence from the United Kingdom in 1971; the economy is dominated by oil
n. a peninsula extending northward from the Arabian mainland into the Persian Gulf

qatari.t:
n. 卡塔尔人
a. 卡塔尔的
qatari.d:
n. a native or inhabitant of Qatar
a. of or concerning Qatar or its inhabitants

qatari riyal.t: [网络] 卡达里亚尔；卡塔尔里亚尔

qawwali.t: n. 克瓦利（苏菲派穆斯林用于祈祷的音乐）

qazi.t: n. (Qazi)人名；(阿富、巴基、伊朗)卡齐
